fact_claims.claim: Nightly memory and wiki maintenance is scheduled for 03:00 Europe/Vilnius.

evidence_refs.note: Daily durable note covering nightly maintenance enablement.

reflections.observation: The memory system now has docs, wiki pages, and a SQLite store, but candidate ingestion was the missing step.
reflections.pattern: Architecture and documentation were implemented first, then the typed store, then ingestion glue.
reflections.recommended_action: Use nightly maintenance to generate candidate fact claims and reflections into SQLite with evidence refs before publishing durable summaries.

procedures.name: Ingest candidate memory records into SQLite
procedures.purpose: Load candidate fact claims, reflections, and procedures into the structured memory store with evidence refs.
steps: Prepare a JSON payload with fact_claims, reflections, and procedures arrays.
Review inserted rows and evidence refs.
Promote only validated records into human-facing summaries.
expected_outcomes: Candidate records are stored in SQLite.
Evidence refs point back to notes or wiki pages.
rollback: Delete inserted rows by id if the candidate payload was wrong.
safety_notes: Do not use candidate ingestion to silently canonize risky security or access-control claims.
